title: Onboard Waqar: Full Project Context and Environment Setup
description:
Onboarding task for Waqar as a code owner (per CODEOWNERS) to get fully caught up on project context, documentation, tools, and access for the V3 architecture planning phase.

## Setup Steps
1. Clone the repository to local machine via Cursor IDE
2. Get Jira MCP up and running to access Jira tickets inside AI chat
3. Review docs/JIRA_TICKET_BACKLOG.md Phase 0 for full description and acceptance criteria
4. Get familiar with current project documentation and tooling
acceptance_criteria: Repository is cloned and accessible via Cursor IDE
Jira MCP is configured and can access Jira tickets in AI chat
Waqar has reviewed Phase 0 documentation and project context
Development environment is functional for local development
implementation_notes: Part of V3 Architecture Planning onboarding. Waqar is listed as a code owner in CODEOWNERS file.
